DSE要考BAFS,ECON既同學仔，有咩唔識可以係到問，如果我識既，我一定盡量答，純粹想幫下人，支持下DSE生。

DSE ECON好難
大家一齊討論下
DSE ECON好難

which of the following statements about free good and economic good is / aer correct?

(1) there is no compettion for a free good while there is competiion for an economic good in a society.

(2) the total willingness to pay for a free good is lower than that for an economic good.

(3) no one is willing to pay a price for a free good while everyone is willing to pay a price for an economic good.


A. (1) only
B. (1) and (2) only
C. (2) and (3) only
D. all of the above

which of the following statements about free good and economic good is / aer correct?

(1) there is no compettion for a free good while there is competiion for an economic good in a society.

(2) the total willingness to pay for a free good is lower than that for an economic good.

(3) no one is willing to pay a price for a free good while everyone is willing to pay a price for an economic good.


A. (1) only
B. (1) and (2) only
C. (2) and (3) only
D. all of the above

A?

利申17年考DSE

又係呢條

Econ
免費物品有冇使用的機會成本同生產的機會成本？

免費物品係無使用既機會成本架，好似空氣咁，你唔可以將佢吸哂，雖然佢係有其他用途，但佢既數量夠哂我地做所有既用途，全部選項都應該無分優次，所以點會有機會成本

as your name suggested, the answer is "A" instead.
go check cliff yeung facebook. this is question 2.
Total willingness to pay唔關個price事, 係講緊個TB, free good個TB都可以好大, 大過econ good都得, as long as佢冇intersact個supply個P都會係0, 你話個willingness to pay at the margin of free good就通常低過that of econ good啫

D
因為為definition of free good is the resources available is enough to satisfy all human wants and people don't prefer more of it no oc in use and produce the free good

Definition of economic good is the resources available is not enough to satisfy all human wants and people prefer more of it and involve oc in use and produce the good

So 1,2,3 are both correct
Ans is D
